sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42416" key="e)righqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρι-γηθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n42416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very joyful,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">L.Prooem.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
